visualizations.title: BODMAS / PEMDAS Order
visualizations.description: The hierarchy of operations from highest priority to lowest.

steps.explanation: Parentheses / Brackets: Solve all operations inside groupings first.
Exponents / Orders: Calculate powers, indices, and roots next.
Multiplication & Division: Equal priority. Solve from left to right.
Addition & Subtraction: Equal priority. Solve from left to right.

visualizations.title: Step-by-Step Expression Evaluation
visualizations.description: Watch how the expression 6 + (10 - 4) × 2 is evaluated according to order of operations.
